prompt: You are helping a K-12 student program a Pololu robot kit. Write only valid Python code (no markdown, no explanations) for one function named drive_forward(speed, seconds). It must validate both inputs and return a simple command string for safe forward movement.

You are helping a K-12 student program a Pololu robot kit. Write only valid Python code (no markdown, no explanations) for one function named turn_left(angle). It should return a controlled left-turn command.

You are helping a K-12 student program a Pololu robot kit. Write only valid Python code (no markdown, no explanations) for one function named stop_if_obstacle_detected(distance_cm). It should return whether the robot must stop before collision.

You are helping a K-12 student program a Pololu robot kit. Write only valid Python code (no markdown, no explanations) for one function named follow_line(left_sensor, right_sensor). It should return the next motion instruction.

You are helping a K-12 student program a Pololu robot kit. Write only valid Python code (no markdown, no explanations) for one function named update_status_led(state). It should map idle, moving, and error states to LED colors.

You are helping a K-12 student program a Pololu robot kit. Write only valid Python code (no markdown, no explanations) for one function named toggle_run_mode(current_mode, button_pressed). It should switch between pause and run and return the new mode.
